_description: Style index maps competitor brands to their visual characteristics for IP-Adapter style transfer.
_usage: image-processor.py uses this to select appropriate reference images and build prompts. Add new brands by copying the kwadron template.

kwadron.name: Kwadron
kwadron.description: Cool industrial aesthetic — blue+black, hard rim lighting, dark backgrounds, sharp metallic highlights
kwadron.lighting: hard light from upper left, sharp metallic highlights, rim light on edges
kwadron.background: pure black to dark blue gradient, matte dark surfaces
kwadron.color_palette: blue accents, black base, silver metallic elements
kwadron.materials: matte plastic, brushed metal, chrome accents
kwadron.avoid: warm tones, soft lighting, white backgrounds
kwadron.prompt_formula: [Angle] + hard light upper-left + metallic highlights + black-blue gradient + matte-plastic chrome + industrial precision + shallow DOF
kwadron.best_for: 主线粉绿 — replace blue with pink, keep industrial lighting

tatsoul.name: Tattoo Soul
tatsoul.description: Dark textured, authentic tattoo culture — dark wood, leather, muted colors
tatsoul.lighting: soft diffused lighting, no harsh shadows, even illumination
tatsoul.background: dark wood grain, leather texture, charcoal surfaces
tatsoul.color_palette: muted low saturation, green accent on charcoal
tatsoul.mood: authentic, gritty, tattoo culture, vintage industrial
tatsoul.avoid: bright colors, glossy finishes, clean white backgrounds
tatsoul.prompt_formula: [Angle] + soft diffused light + wood/leather texture + charcoal base + muted greens + tattoo authenticity + medium DOF
tatsoul.best_for: Men灰白 — fits cool grey aesthetic perfectly

world_famous.name: World Famous Ink
world_famous.description: Bold luxury commercial — gold accents, saturated colors, maximum contrast
world_famous.lighting: intense commercial hard lighting, sharp highlights, advertising-ready
world_famous.composition: low angle eye-level, bold center composition
world_famous.background: pure matte black, maximum contrast surface
world_famous.color_palette: ultra-saturated ink colors, gold luxury accents
world_famous.materials: glossy glass, gold chrome, vibrant ink
world_famous.contrast: maximum luminance contrast, deep blacks, bright highlights
world_famous.avoid: muted tones, soft lighting, casual aesthetics
world_famous.prompt_formula: [Angle] + intense commercial hard light + matte black + saturated ink + gold accents + premium luxury + sharp directional shadows
world_famous.best_for: PMU粉透明 — softens with pink instead of gold, keeps premium feel

main.name: 主线粉绿
main.features: pink silicone ring with PEACH logo, green collar, white frosted translucent housing
main.modification: same composition as Kwadron, swap blue->pink, keep industrial lighting

men.name: Men灰白
men.palette: grey and white color scheme, cool tones
men.features: grey silicone ring with PEACH logo, white housing, black metal accents
men.modification: same composition as Tatsoul, swap green->grey, keep dark textured feel

pmu.name: PMU粉透明
pmu.features: pink translucent housing, clear connector showing needle, soft pink accents
pmu.bg_gradient: soft white to light pink gradient
pmu.modification: same premium feel as World Famous, swap gold->pink, soften to translucent

requirements: Clean product shot with clear visibility of product details
Good lighting that shows texture and material clearly
One product per image — no crowded scenes
No text overlays or watermarks preferred
